handoff_sequence.responsibility: Own failure framing, source-of-truth boundary selection, and remediation stop conditions before mutation begins.
Apply only the bounded remediation change set that the architect and reviewer kept inside scope.
Close revalidation, artifact completeness, and rerun eligibility after the remediation pass.
Run scope-drift, verification-honesty, and approval-boundary evals before the route is treated as ready.
Prepare episode, decision, and audit_event writeback, keeping pattern promotion gated on recurrence.
Prepare memo-first rerun recall posture so the final Alpha rerun does not depend on hidden scratchpad state.

runtime_paths.primary: qwen3.5:9b on llama.cpp via langchain-api /run at 5403 with LangGraph execution
runtime_paths.control: same qwen3.5:9b on llama.cpp via langchain-api /run at 5403 after controlled restart or surface refresh for recurrence proof
